_comment: Tier-2 trigger evals: for a given changed file, which skill(s) MUST the routing map (agent-os/docs/skill-triggers.md) surface? trigger-eval.ts resolves each file against the trigger table and reports expected skills the map fails to surface. Reported, not gated, until calibrated — see README.md. Add a case whenever you wire a new file-pattern → skill route.

cases.why: Adding/changing a route must run the API-contract chain.
Schema files route through the full schema chain including RLS review.
Editing locale copy must run the i18n guard.
Worker changes must run the workers-events skill.
A new migration must run the migration maintainer.
Changing a DB context wrapper must run the RLS / tenant-isolation guard.
Changing the idempotency engine must run the idempotency guard.
